mechanism: Structural breaks reduce the appropriate percentile reading of current rate divergence from 85th-97th (full sample) to 60th-75th (post-2008 reference), weakening the compressed spring signal from 'extreme' to 'moderate' and directly lowering the probability estimate.
regime_dependence: Impact depends on which structural regime (pre-1985, 1985-2008, post-2008) is appropriate reference; resolvable via Bai-Perron test
